ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Josephi Lanzoni philos. et medic: doctoris ferrariensis &S.R.I.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Academiae Leopoldino-Imperialis Naturae Curiosorum & c. Collegae Dissertatio de lacrymis
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The dedicatee is mentioned as member of the very famous `Recuperatorum Academiae` (Accademia dei Ricovrati).
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: D. Steph Cupilli Congr. Somaschae Theol. in almo Gymnasio Lector pro Reverendiss. P. Inq. Ferrariae Librorum Censor vidi, & iudico posse imprimi --- Imprimatur --- Fr. Io. Dominicus Accursius Vicarius S. Officii Ferrariae & c. Dominicus Maria Gattus Canonicus Vic. Capit.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
